items.claim: Max Holloway's striking IQ is very high and he does not get hit much.
items.quote: Max Holloway's shown some mate, he's he's striking like he's he's striking IQ is so good. Doesn't get hit much.

items.claim: Conor McGregor has a 6-year layoff from fighting.
items.quote: 6 years off is a long time

items.claim: Max Holloway is in the later stages of his career.
items.quote: Max is definitely later on in his career.

items.claim: Conor McGregor's knockout power remains despite his long layoff.
items.quote: power doesn't leave. That Like, he just needs one shot and it can be over

items.claim: Max Holloway's timing will be superior to McGregor's due to his higher level of activity.
items.quote: His timing is definitely going to be better cuz he's been fighting way more regular than McGregor.

items.claim: Max Holloway can win by out-voluming McGregor using footwork and timing.
items.quote: Holloway wins by just out-voluming him, being at the right spots at the right time, very tall, lanky guy, using good footwork, using good timing.
